evals.prompt: 我有一个 Express.js 的后端项目，目前所有业务逻辑都写在 controller 里，数据库查询也直接在 controller 中调用。项目越来越大，改一个功能经常要改好几个文件。我想重构一下，应该怎么分层？
evals.expected_output: Should use the core/adapter/infra framing, distinguish role view vs source dependency view vs call flow view, explain dependency violations precisely, and provide minimal restructuring guidance with examples

assertions.name: uses_core_adapter_infra_framing
assertions.description: Response must organize the answer using core, adapter, infra and split core into use_case/entity plus adapter into inbound/outbound

assertions.name: distinguishes_architecture_views
assertions.description: Response must distinguish role view, source dependency view, and call flow view instead of collapsing them into one dependency diagram

assertions.name: explains_source_dependency_precisely
assertions.description: Response must explain that inbound depends on use_case, use_case depends on entity and port abstractions, outbound implements ports and depends on infra

assertions.name: provides_concrete_steps
assertions.description: Response must provide a numbered or structured step-by-step refactoring plan

assertions.name: includes_code_examples
assertions.description: Response must include at least one before/after code example showing the refactoring

evals.prompt: 我们团队在做一个电商系统，现在 Order 实体直接 import 了 Stripe 的 SDK 来处理支付。这样设计有什么问题？怎么改？
evals.expected_output: Should identify the violation using core/use_case/entity/adapter/infra language, explain why entity must not depend on external SDKs, and show a port-based redesign where outbound adapter depends on infra

assertions.name: uses_updated_layer_language
assertions.description: Response should classify Stripe SDK as infra, entity as core, and the integration as outbound adapter or port boundary

assertions.name: identifies_dependency_violation
assertions.description: Response must identify this as a dependency rule / DIP violation because entity should not depend on external SDKs or framework details

assertions.name: explains_why_problematic
assertions.description: Response must explain why entities depending on SDKs is problematic (e.g., tight coupling, hard to test, violates dependency rule)

assertions.name: proposes_port_and_outbound_adapter_solution
assertions.description: Response must propose moving Stripe integration behind a port/interface owned by use_case, implemented by an outbound adapter that depends on infra

assertions.name: shows_refactored_code
assertions.description: Response must show code demonstrating the interface-based solution with before/after or implementation example

evals.prompt: 我要开发一个内部工具，大概 5 个人用，做简单的 CRUD 操作。同事建议我用微服务架构 + Kafka 消息队列 + Redis 缓存。你觉得呢？
evals.expected_output: Should apply Musk's 'question the requirement' and 'delete' steps, push back on over-engineering, recommend simple architecture

assertions.name: questions_complexity
assertions.description: Response must question or challenge the need for microservices/Kafka/Redis given the simple requirements

assertions.name: pushes_back_on_overengineering
assertions.description: Response must explicitly state that the proposed architecture is over-engineered or unnecessarily complex

assertions.name: recommends_simple_alternative
assertions.description: Response must recommend a simpler architecture (e.g., monolith, single database, no message queue)

assertions.name: explains_reasoning
assertions.description: Response must explain why simpler is better in this context (e.g., team size, use case, maintenance burden)
